prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to local authority capital expenditure and receipts in England and does not apply to Scotland, as local authority structures and financial regulations differ across the UK. Scotland has its own system of governance and fiscal procedures.
